error_concentration_summary: Errors universally concentrate at >7000m trench bin and lat_band +20 (NW Pacific subduction zone). No product-specific anomaly.
Same global pattern as GEBCO; slightly higher bias in trenches.
Excess over GEBCO is global (every depth bin ~+5-10 m RMSE); not regional. Trench tail similar to GEBCO/ETOPO. Southern hemisphere lat_band -70 elevated (RMSE 72.6 vs 40 for GEBCO).

Elevated error is globally distributed (every depth bin and lat band has SDUST RMSE > peers by 5-30 m). Most pronounced in mid-depth bins (1000-5000 m: RMSE 68-72 vs 50-55 for GEBCO/ETOPO) and at high southern/northern latitudes (-40 RMSE 60 vs ~36; +70 RMSE 57 vs ~24). Consistent with altimetric model limitations away from in-situ constraints.
Excess over GEBCO is global (every depth bin ~+5-15 m RMSE); not regional. Trench tail similar to peers. Southern hemisphere lat_band -70 elevated (RMSE 77.8 vs 40 for GEBCO).
